title: impatiens gossweileri subsp. gossweileri
intro: Impatiens gossweileri subsp. gossweileri, also known as the yellow balsam, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits associated with Impatiens gossweileri subsp. gossweileri include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a wound healer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
